items.title: Father with ‘deep respect for the ocean’ identified as spearfisherman killed by shark near Albany
items.standfirst: Daniel Turpin was spearfishing about 10 metres off the coast of Michaelmas Island in King George Sound when he was attacked by a shark.
items.content: Daniel Turpin was spearfishing about 10 metres off the coast of Michaelmas Island in King George Sound when he was attacked by a shark.

items.title: Daniel Turpin named as diver killed in WA shark attack
items.standfirst: The family of a 35-year-old diver who died after being bitten by a shark has described him as "an adored husband, son, brother and uncle who had a lifelong love and deep respect for the ocean".
items.content: The family of a 35-year-old diver who died after being bitten by a shark has described him as "an adored husband, son, brother and uncle who had a lifelong love and deep respect for the ocean".

items.content: Police say up to 10 people were fighting inside the station on Saturday night before some boarded a train still armed with machetes.
